**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Correct the failed diff-check proof**

For this proof bundle, `git diff --check f5afca8^ f5afca8 -- proof/dogfood/2026-05-27/run9` reports trailing-whitespace errors across the added trace/log artifacts because the committed files contain extra carriage returns, so the recorded `git diff --check`: passed result is not reproducible from the actual commit. This undermines the PR-proof artifact and should be fixed by normalizing the captured files or updating the proof to show the check that was actually run.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
